tasks.label: Build and Run Calendar App
tasks.command: dotnet build CalendarApp.sln && echo 'Build completed. To run the application, open CalendarApp.sln in Visual Studio and press F5, or use IIS Express.'

tasks.label: Build Calendar App
tasks.command: msbuild CalendarApp.sln /p:Configuration=Debug /p:Platform="Any CPU" ; Write-Host 'Build completed. To run: Open CalendarApp.sln in Visual Studio and press F5.'
